prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为：2021年约618名、2022年约494名、2023年约542名、2024年约510名、2025年约729名。近五年位次波 动较大，2022年达到最低点494名后逐步回升，2025年大幅后移至729名，较2024年增加约219名，为近五年最高位次，显示竞争格局有所松动；2021年计划招生2 9人，2022–2025年连续四年稳定在28人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名：2021–2023年第20名，2024年第21名，2025年第23名，2026年回升至第21名，稳 居全国顶尖高校行列，学校层次对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内南开大学声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被免职、多位教师 被举报）、师德师风等8起事件，其中7起为负面。抖音热度排名第36位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上。2022年曾出现河南断档事件，2023年师德师风事件中性偏负面。综合来 看，2026年声誉负面信号较为集中，可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生一定抑制作用；南开大学拥有14个A类及以上学科，其中化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数 学为A+；中国语言文学、世界史、中国史、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论为A；环境科学与工程为A-。优势学科覆盖了该校在海南招生的经济 学类、金融学类、工商管理类、理科试验班（数学与大数据）、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）等主要专业大类，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显 示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；临床医学为推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望。南开大学在海南招生的金融学类、经济学类、工科试验班（信息科 学与技术）等专业与高热推荐方向高度吻合，有利于维持报考热度。海南省考生总数：2021年52977人→2025年67408人，持续增长；2026年预估约78000人（不确定），较2025年增 长约15.7%，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上 因素：2025年基准位次729名为近五年最高，反映竞争有所松动；2026年招生计划持平，无扩招缓解效应；海南省考生总数预计增长约15.7%，竞争压力加大；但南开大学2026年声 誉负面信号集中，可能抑制部分报考热情，与考生增长形成对冲。权衡后判断2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅前移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约714名，区间628–800名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次714名处于区间628–800名中部偏下。建议位次在628名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的理科试验班（数学与大数据）和金融学类；位次在650–750名的考生以二档的经济学 类、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）为主攻方向，兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在750–800名的考生以三档的法学、中国语言文学类为稳妥选择，工商管理类虽学科评估A+但社会热度 偏低，可作为保底。南开大学在海南招生专业均属优势学科覆盖范围，整体报考价值较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were: approximately 618 in 2021, 494 in 2022, 542 in 2023, 510 in 2024, and 729 in 2025. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past five years, reaching a low of 494 in 2022 before gradually rising, with a sharp drop to 729 in 2025, an increase of about 219 places from 2024, the highest in five years, indicating a loosening of competition. The enrollment plan was 29 students in 2021 and stabilized at 28 students from 2022 to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, it ranked 20th from 2021 to 2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and rose back to 21st in 2026, consistently among the top universities in China, with strong appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative,' involving 8 incidents of academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal, multiple faculty reports) and teacher ethics, with 7 being negative. It ranked 36th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. In 2022, there was a gap in admissions in Henan, and in 2023, teacher ethics incidents were neutral to negative. Overall, the negative reputation signals in 2026 are concentrated, potentially suppressing some candidates' willingness to apply. Nankai University has 14 A-level or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics; A in Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Chinese History, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, and Marxist Theory; and A- in Environmental Science and Engineering. Its advantageous disciplines cover major enrollment categories in Hainan, such as Economics, Finance, Business Administration, Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data), and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended; Clinical Medicine is recommended; Law, Finance/Economics, and Business are divided and under observation. Nankai University's enrollment categories in Hainan, such as Finance, Economics, and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology), align closely with highly recommended directions, helping maintain application popularity. Total number of candidates in Hainan Province: 52,977 in 2021 → 67,408 in 2025, continuously increasing; estimated about 78,000 in 2026 (uncertain), an increase of about 15.7% from 2025, with the expanding candidate pool intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the 2025 baseline ranking of 729 is the highest in five years, reflecting loosened competition; the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, with no expansion to alleviate pressure; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province is expected to increase by about 15.7%, increasing competitive pressure; however, Nankai University's concentrated negative reputation signals in 2026 may suppress some application enthusiasm, offsetting the candidate growth. Balancing these factors, the 2026 minimum admission ranking is predicted to slightly improve (slightly intensified competition) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 714, and a range of 628–800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 714 is in the lower-middle part of the 628–800 range. Candidates with rankings within 628 are advised to focus on Tier 1's Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Finance; those with rankings between 650–750 should target Tier 2's Economics and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) as main directions, while also considering Tier 1 edge majors; candidates with rankings between 750–800 should choose Tier 3's Law and Chinese Language and Literature as safe options, with Business Administration, despite its A+ discipline evaluation, having lower social popularity, serving as a backup. All majors Nankai University enrolls in Hainan fall within its advantageous disciplines, offering high overall application value.
